creator: godevilove@ya.ru
text:
Without 'PROFILE' config option the port builds just fine, but with that it results into this:
/usr/local/bin/ld: /usr/lib/crtbeginT.o: relocation R_X86_64_32 against undefined symbol `__deregister_frame_info' can not be used when making a shared object; recompile with -fPIC
/usr/local/bin/ld: final link failed: Nonrepresentable section on output
collect2: error: ld returned 1 exit status
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/math/blas
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/math/blas
